name: Steve Kelly
bio: Steve Kelly founded Maine Dispensary Guide after working with Maine cannabis operators through the state's early adult-use rollout. He focuses on making regulatory complexity accessible to entrepreneurs building legitimate businesses in Maine.
credentials: Primary source research from OCP and municipal offices
Direct operator interviews and case studies

name: Calvin Waters
bio: Calvin Waters covers Maine OCP licensing, municipal authorization, and regulatory compliance for Maine Dispensary Guide. His work focuses on the procedural mechanics of getting a cannabis business licensed and maintaining compliance once operational.

name: Margaret Finch
bio: Margaret Finch covers 280E tax strategy, dispensary economics, and financial planning for Maine cannabis operators. She specializes in helping operators understand the real cost of compliance and profitability in the Maine market.

name: Eliot Nash
bio: Eliot Nash covers Maine cannabis market analysis, municipal zoning, and site selection for Maine Dispensary Guide. His work focuses on the geographic and competitive landscape of Maine's cannabis market.
